languages.text: {n}Вы слышите жужжание аугментов, когда ваш предок устремляет взгляд в сторону Иокасты.{/n} "Изимонд достойно служил мне. Надеюсь, отпрыски не посрамили его память".
{n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Sauerback.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."
languages.original_text: {n}Вы слышите жужжание аугментов, когда ваш предок устремляет взгляд в сторону Иокасты.{/n} "Изимонд достойно служил мне. Надеюсь, отпрыски не посрамили его память".

traits.locale_text: {n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Jocasta.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."
{n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Jocasta.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."
{n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Jocasta.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."
{n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Jocasta.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."

languages.text: {n}Du hörst das Surren von Augmentationen, als dein Ahnherr seinen Blick auf Sauerback richtet.{/n} "Isimond hat mir gut gedient. Ich hoffe, sein Nachfahren haben sein Andenken nicht entehrt."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Sauerback.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du hörst das Surren von Augmentationen, als dein Ahnherr seinen Blick auf Sauerback richtet.{/n} "Isimond hat mir gut gedient. Ich hoffe, sein Nachfahren haben sein Andenken nicht entehrt."

languages.text: {n}Vous entendez les augmétiques de votre ancêtre vrombir tandis que son regard se porte sur Sauerback.{/n} « Isimond a fait un travail remarquable à mon service. J'espère que ses descendants continuent à honorer sa mémoire. »
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Sauerback.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous entendez les augmétiques de votre ancêtre vrombir tandis que son regard se porte sur Sauerback.{/n} « Isimond a fait un travail remarquable à mon service. J'espère que ses descendants continuent à honorer sa mémoire. »

languages.text: {n}Oyes el chirrido de los auméticos cuando tu antepasado dirige la mirada hacia Sauerback.{/n} «Isimond me sirvió bien. Espero que sus descendientes no hayan deshonrado su recuerdo».
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Sauerback.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}Oyes el chirrido de los auméticos cuando tu antepasado dirige la mirada hacia Sauerback.{/n} «Isimond me sirvió bien. Espero que sus descendientes no hayan deshonrado su recuerdo».

languages.text: {n}Atan bakışlarını Sauerback'e çevirirken ogmetiklerin vızıltısını duyuyorsun.{/n} "İsimond bana iyi hizmet etti. Umarım torunları onun anısına leke sürmemiştir."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Sauerback.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}Atan bakışlarını Sauerback'e çevirirken ogmetiklerin vızıltısını duyuyorsun.{/n} "İsimond bana iyi hizmet etti. Umarım torunları onun anısına leke sürmemiştir."

languages.text: {n}伴随着植入物运转的嗡鸣声，你的先祖把目光转向苏尔贝克。{/n}“伊西蒙德曾尽职尽责地为我效力。我希望他的后人没有玷污他的名声。”
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Sauerback.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}伴随着植入物运转的嗡鸣声，你的先祖把目光转向苏尔贝克。{/n}“伊西蒙德曾尽职尽责地为我效力。我希望他的后人没有玷污他的名声。”

languages.text:
{n}祖先がサウアーバックの方へ視線を向ける。機械の音が聞こえる。{/n}
「イシモンドは私にとって忠実な従者だった。彼の子孫が彼の名を汚さないことを願う。」
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Sauerback.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."

traits.locale_text:

「イシモンドは私にとって忠実な従者だった。彼の子孫が彼の名を汚さないことを願う。」
